questionHtml: Explain, with a reason, why the answer to part (e) might not be the best lower bound.
markschemeHtml:
EITHER

deleting a different vertex                            A1

might give a higher value (and hence a better lower bound).                            R1


OR

the edges selected in part (e) do not form a cycle.                            A1

so a higher value is possible                            R1

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Explain, with a reason, why the answer to part (e) might not be the best lower bound.
breadcrumbLabels: AHL 3.16—Tree and cycle algorithms, Chinese postman, travelling salesman
